work_performed: Control room: ERCOT 4CP (Four Coincident Peak) event triggered 1435 hrs. Plant at 100% capacity 1004MW. Real-time price peaked $185.50/MWh. All ancillary services products delivered REGUP REGDN and RRS. Event ended 1602 hrs. Revenue impact estimated $380k for 2-hour window.

Control room: Routine shift operations. GT1 compressor inlet differential pressure trending slightly high - notified Michelle Beaumont for engineering review. All permit parameters within TCEQ limits. Natural gas nominations confirmed with Shell and BP for next 3 days.

Control room: GT2 exhaust thermocouple T48 reading 2.1 degrees Fahrenheit above historical baseline. Cross-checked with adjacent T48 thermocouples - consistent reading. GE LTSA notified. GE remote monitoring team reviewing data. Plant operations continue pending GE guidance. No curtailment.
